pi_items.source: Explicitly required by the prompt description.

privileged_info_summary: Discovered that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely. The target directory structure requirements and regex test strings ('Contact me at test.user@example.com today.', 'Call 555-123-4567 now.', 'My SSN is 123-45-6789.') match the prompt description and verifier logic.
